person.name: Malcolm Drummond 9th Thane of Lennox

popularStory.headline: Companheiro de Robert, the Bruce
popularStory.description:
Nono senescal de Lennox, companheiro de Robert the Bruce em 1315, de quem recebeu terras em
Perth. C.c. uma filha de sir Patrick Graham of Kincardine.
Robert Bruce VI, também conhecido como Robert I …

zh.Dryman, Dumbartonshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾
zh.Drymen, Stirlingshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾德門
zh.lifeSummary: 當Malcolm Drummond 9th Thane of Lennox於1270年之後出生在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾德門時，他的父親John Drummond 8th Thane Of Lennox8749歲，母親Elena Stewart8745歲。他於1292年之前與Margaret Graham of Menteith在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他於1314年登記服兵役。他去世於1325年在他的家鄉，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.Drymen, Stirlingshire, Scotland: 英国苏格兰斯林史爾德門
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Malcolm Drummond 9th Thane of Lennox于1270年之后出生在英国苏格兰斯林史爾德門时，他的父亲John Drummond 8th Thane Of Lennox8749岁，母亲Elena Stewart8745岁。他于1292年之前与Margaret Graham of Menteith在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他于1314年登记服兵役。他去世于1325年在他的家乡，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Drummond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places, notably the barony of Drummond, which is probably identical with the parish of Drymen (Stirlingshire), named from Gaelic drumainn, a derivative of druim ‘ridge’. It has been said that the principal family of this name are descended from a Hungarian nobleman, Maurice, who accompanied Edgar Atheling and his sister Margaret to Scotland in 1068, where she married King Malcolm III. However, there is disagreement on whether or not this was the case.

English: occasionally perhaps from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Dromund (Old Norse Drómundr, apparently from a word denoting a kind of Byzantine galley prevalent till the 12th cent., from Greek dromōn ‘runner’).

variants.name: Drummonds
meanings: Scottish: variant of Drummond , with post-medieval excrescent -s. In Britain this surname is found mainly in County Durham.

nameMeanings.name: Malcolm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the medieval Gaelic name Mael Coluim ‘devotee of St Columba’. Columba was a 6th-century monk of Irish origin who played a leading part in the conversion to Christianity of Scotland and northern England; see also Callum and Colm . He has always been one of the most popular saints in Scotland, but in the Middle Ages it was felt to be presumptuous to give the names of saints directly to children; instead their blessing was invoked by prefixing the name with mael ‘devotee of’ or gille ‘servant of’. Since the 1930s the given name has been used widely in the English-speaking world, not just by those with Scottish connections.

en.lifeSummary: When Malcolm Drummond 9th Thane of Lennox was born after 1270, in Drymen, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, John Drummond 8th Thane Of Lennox, was 8749 and his mother, Elena Stewart, was 8745. He married Margaret Graham of Menteith before 1292, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He registered for military service in 1314. He died in 1325, in his hometown, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Malcolm Drummond 9th Thane of Lennox est né après 1270, à Drymen, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Drummond 8th Thane Of Lennox, avait 8749 ans et sa mère, Elena Stewart, avait 8745 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Graham of Menteith avant 1292, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1314. Il est décédé en 1325, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Malcolm Drummond 9th Thane of Lennox nach 1270 in Drymen, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Drummond 8th Thane Of Lennox 8749 und seine Mutter Elena Stewart 8745. Er hat vor 1292 in Scotland Margaret Graham of Menteith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er hat sich 1314 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1325 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Malcolm Drummond 9th Thane of Lennox è nato il dopo il 1270 nel Drymen, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Drummond 8th Thane Of Lennox, aveva 8749 anni e il suo madre, Elena Stewart, aveva 8745 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Graham of Menteith prima del 1292, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1314. Morì nel 1325, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.Stirlingshire, Scotland: スコットランドスティルリングシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Malcolm Drummond 9th Thane of Lennoxが1270年以後にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアドリメンで生まれた時，父John Drummond 8th Thane Of Lennoxは8749歳，母Elena Stewartは8745歳であった。1292年以前にスコットランドでMargaret Graham of Menteithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1314年に兵役登録をした。彼は1325年に故郷で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Malcolm Drummond 9th Thane of Lennox(이)가 1270년 이후 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 드리멘에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Drummond 8th Thane Of Lennox(은)는 8749세였고, 그의 어머니 Elena Stewart(은)는 8745세였다. 그는 1292년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Margaret Graham of Menteith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1314년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1325년 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

mn.Drymen, Stirlingshire, Scotland: Drymen, Striviling, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Malcolm Drummond 9th Thane of Lennox nasceu após 1270, em Drymen, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Drummond 8th Thane Of Lennox, tinha 8749 anos e sua mãe, Elena Stewart, tinha 8745 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Graham of Menteith antes 1292, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1314. Ele faleceu em 1325, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Malcolm Drummond 9th Thane of Lennox родился после 1270 г. в местности дримен, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Drummond 8th Thane Of Lennox было 8749 лет, а матери, которую звали Elena Stewart, 8745. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Graham of Menteith перед 1292 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. В 1314 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1325 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Malcolm Drummond 9th Thane of Lennox nació después de 1270, en Drymen, Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, John Drummond 8th Thane Of Lennox, tenía 8749 años y su mamá, Elena Stewart, tenía 8745 años. Se casó con Margaret Graham of Menteith antes de 1292, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1314. Murió en 1325, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
